texto: Loyalty in the legal world is distorting its own peculiar sense of reality. Loyalty is the legal world's gravity: it holds that world together; it is omnipotent; it cannot be seen but its effects are observable; it can be a powerful force of destruction. As it grows stronger and more powerful, one can only hope such a strange world will be ultimately crushed by its own “weight.
explicacao: Citação de TheKeyAuthor sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Loyalty in the legal world is distorting its own peculiar sense of reality. Loyalty is the legal …” articula desenvolvimento-pessoal, corruption, legal-system em registro de desenvolvimento pessoal, com relevância para contextos como legal-system.
